items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

items.title: Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK
items.summary:
Learn how to integrate the Copilot SDK into a React Native app to generate AI-powered issue summaries, with production patterns for graceful degradation and caching.
The post Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.

items.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
items.summary: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

items.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
items.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

items.title: GitHub expands application security coverage with AI‑powered detections
items.summary:
CodeQL and AI‑powered detections work together in GitHub Code Security to identify vulnerabilities across more languages and frameworks.
The post GitHub expands application security coverage with AI‑powered detections appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
The Bay Area’s animal welfare movement wants to recruit AI
items.summary: In early February, animal welfare advocates and AI researchers gathered in stocking feet at Mox, a scrappy, shoes-free coworking space in San Francisco.

items.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
items.summary: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

items.title: Meet the former Apple designer building a new AI interface at Hark
items.summary: The company said it would design models, hardware, and interfaces in tandem to deliver a "seamless end-to-end personal intelligence product."
